zh.lifeSummary: 當John Howard於大約1385年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir John Howard20歲，母親Lady Margaret Plaiz19歲。他於大約1409年與Johanna Walton在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1409年12月13日在英國諾福爾可維廷享年25歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維廷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Howard于大约1385年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir John Howard20岁，母亲Lady Margaret Plaiz19岁。他于大约1409年与Johanna Walton在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1409年12月13日在英国諾福爾可維廷享年25岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維廷。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Howard was born about 1385, in Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John Howard, was 20 and his mother, Lady Margaret Plaiz, was 19. He married Johanna Walton about 1409, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 13 December 1409, in Weeting, Norfolk, England, at the age of 25, and was buried in Weeting, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Howard est né environ 1385, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Howard, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Plaiz, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Walton environ 1409, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1409, à Weeting, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Weeting, Norfolk, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: John Howard(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Howard(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Plaiz(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1409년 영국 노르폴크에서 Johanna Walton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 12월 13일 영국 노르폴크 위틴그에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 위틴그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Howard nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Howard, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Plaiz, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Walton aproximadamente 1409, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1409, em Weeting, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Weeting, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Howard родился около 1385 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Howard было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Plaiz, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Walton около 1409 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 13 декабря 1409 г. в местности витинг, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности витинг, норфолк, Англия.
